caption: A white team bus is parked in front of a modern building featuring the "Real Madrid" logo and text on its exterior wall. The bus is white with dark windows and a sleek design, positioned on a paved surface next to a grassy area with manicured shrubbery in large grey planters. A white logo of the club is also visible in the top right corner of the scene. On-screen text in the lower-left area identifies the location and date as "CIUDAD REAL MADRID MONDAY 13TH" with a timestamp of "10:07". Throughout the sequence, the scene remains static, with no movement of people or vehicles, and no changes in the lighting or composition. The frames show a consistent view of the bus and the architectural backdrop of the training facility.
